title: Janie Gets Married
writer: Agnes Christine Johnston, Josephine Bentham, Herschel V. Williams Jr.
actors: Joan Leslie, Robert Hutton, Edward Arnold
plot: Married life isn't as blissful as either Dick or Janie had hoped. Dick is hired to write filler for his father-in-law's newspaper, but is never allowed to prove his real worth. Janie has to do housekeeping while dealing with a "we...
